subtypes.name: Bit_Count_T
subtypes.code: subtype Bit_Count_T is Natural range 0 .. Bits - 1;

subprograms.name: Chained_Modular_Sum

documentation.description:
# derives Augend_Lower,
#         Augend_Upper from *,
#                           Addend,
#                           Augend_Lower &
#         Overflow     from *,
#                           Addend,

#                           Augend_Upper;

function Conjunction (Left  : in T;
                      Right : in T) return T
